name: B-Vitamin Complex
description_html:
SWOLVERINE® B‑VITAMIN COMPLEX — Energy Support.* Focus Support.* Metabolism Support.*

A vegan, non‑GMO B‑complex designed to support cellular energy production, cognitive function, healthy metabolism, and nervous‑system health—day in, day out. Fully disclosed forms and a convenient once‑daily capsule make it easy to keep your routine consistent. **

Why Choose Swolverine® B‑Complex?

→ Energy Production* — B‑vitamins act as coenzymes that help convert carbohydrates, fats, and proteins into usable energy (ATP) for training and daily life.*

→ Hair, Skin & Nail Support* — Biotin supports healthy keratin structure for hair, skin, and nails.*
→ Vegan & Non‑GMO, Fully Disclosed* — Formulated for label transparency so you know exactly what you’re taking.*

Who It’s For

→ Athletes & High‑Output Days: Support energy metabolism and training readiness.*
→ Busy Professionals & Students: Help maintain focus and productive energy throughout long days.*
→ Vegetarian/Vegan Lifestyles: Daily B‑support, including B12, to help cover common nutrient gaps.*
→ Anyone Building a Solid Daily Stack: A simple foundation for metabolism, brain, and nerve support.*

How It Works (At a Glance)

B‑vitamins serve as cofactors in hundreds of enzymatic reactions tied to ATP production, neurotransmitter synthesis, methylation, and red blood cell formation.* In practice, that means better support for how you turn food into energy, how your brain and nerves function, and how your body maintains everyday vitality.*

Ingredients & Roles (Per Serving)

→ Vitamin B1 (Thiamine) — Supports carbohydrate metabolism and nervous‑system function.*
→ Vitamin B2 (Riboflavin) — Coenzyme for energy pathways (FAD/FMN) with antioxidant support.*
→ Vitamin B3 (Niacin / Niacinamide) — Supports NAD/NADP‑dependent energy reactions and skin/nervous‑system health.*
→ Vitamin B5 (Pantothenic Acid) — Precursor to coenzyme‑A for fatty‑acid metabolism and synthesis pathways.*
→ Vitamin B6 (Pyridoxine) — Supports amino‑acid metabolism, neurotransmitter production, and immune function.*
→ Biotin (B7) — Supports keratin infrastructure for hair, skin, and nails; also involved in glucose and fatty‑acid metabolism.*
→ Folate (B9) — Supports DNA synthesis, methylation, and normal red blood cell formation.*
→ Vitamin B12 (Methylcobalamin) — Supports energy metabolism, neurological function, and red blood cell production.*

→ Label Transparency* — See Supplement Facts for forms and amounts; no proprietary blends.

Potential Benefits*

→ Daily Energy Support* — Back your body’s ATP production for steady, reliable energy.
→ Focus & Cognitive Support* — Help keep mental clarity and concentration on point.
→ Macro Metabolism* — Support efficient breakdown and use of carbs, fats, and proteins.
→ Nervous System & RBC Support* — Back healthy nerve function and oxygen‑carrying capacity.
→ Hair, Skin & Nail Support* — Help maintain healthy appearance from within.

How to Use

→ Take 1 capsule daily with food, or as directed by your healthcare professional.*
→ Morning use pairs well with your first meal; consistency matters most.*

Important Notes

  • Niacin note:  a temporary warming/tingling “flush” may occur.*

  • Color change: Riboflavin (B2) can temporarily brighten urine—this is normal.*

* All benefit statements describe functional support for healthy adults when used as directed alongside a balanced diet, hydration, sleep, and training program; individual responses vary. No claim guarantees specific outcomes.

name: Beta-Alanine
description_html:
BETA‑ALANINE — Delay Fatigue.* Go Longer.* Finish Strong.*

A clinically dosed, stimulant‑free beta‑alanine designed to support muscular endurance, training volume, and between‑set readiness—without fillers or artificial additives. Ideal for high‑intensity intervals, strength work, MetCon sessions, and endurance training when you want more quality reps and sustained output. **

Why Choose Swolverine® Beta‑Alanine?

→ Helps Delay Muscle Fatigue* — Supports intramuscular carnosine levels to buffer exercise‑induced acidity (H+), helping you sustain high‑intensity efforts longer.*
→ Muscular Endurance Support* — Helps you push through longer sets and rounds with less perceived “burn,” supporting more quality work.*
→ Strength & Power Support* — Back‑to‑back bouts feel more repeatable, supporting work capacity and power across sets.*
→ Recovery Between Efforts* — Helps manage exercise metabolites so you’re ready sooner for the next set or interval.*
→ Clinically Dosed & Pure* — 100% beta‑alanine (CarnoSyn®) with disclosed amounts; no proprietary blends or unnecessary additives.*

Who It’s For

→ Cross‑Training & HIIT Athletes: Support repeated, high‑output rounds and fast turnarounds between sets.*
→ Strength & Power Athletes: Support volume at challenging loads and late‑set performance.*
→ Endurance & Team‑Sport Athletes: Support surges, climbs, sprints, and finishing kicks during sustained sessions.*
→ Anyone Seeking Stimulant‑Free Performance Support: Stack seamlessly with creatine, EAAs, and electrolytes.*

How It Works 

Beta‑alanine combines with L‑histidine to form carnosine, an intramuscular buffer that helps neutralize hydrogen ions (H+) produced during intense exercise.* Higher carnosine levels help delay the onset of fatigue, supporting longer time‑to‑exhaustion, training volume, and repeat‑sprint capacity—especially in efforts lasting ~60–240 seconds.*

How to Use

→ Standard daily serving: 3.2 g per day, taken once or split into smaller servings to minimize tingling (paresthesia).* Take daily to saturate muscle carnosine concentration at 3.2-5g for 28 days. 
→ Timing: Pre‑workout or any convenient time; consistency over weeks supports carnosine saturation.*
→ Stack: Pairs well with creatine, citrulline malate, EAAs, and electrolytes as part of a complete performance routine.*

Note on tingling: A temporary paresthesia (skin tingling) is common and normal with beta‑alanine use.*

† These statements have not been evaluated by the Food and Drug Administration. This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease.
General caution: Not for individuals under 18. Consult a healthcare professional if pregnant, nursing, taking medication, or managing a medical condition.

name: Citrulline Malate
description_html:
SWOLVERINE® CITRULLINE MALATE — Training Support.* Go Longer.* Train Hard.*

A simple, single-ingredient training formula for athletes who like to build their own pre-workout stack. Swolverine® Citrulline Malate delivers a 2:1 blend of L-citrulline and malic acid in an unflavored powder that mixes easily with your beverage of choice. Citrulline is converted to L-arginine in the body, which is involved in normal nitric oxide (NO) pathways during exercise, while malate is associated with the body’s natural energy cycles for repeated efforts. **

Why Choose Swolverine® Citrulline Malate?

→ Training Support for Blood Flow & Muscle Fullness* — Provides citrulline, which is involved in arginine and nitric oxide pathways that are associated with normal blood flow and training “pump.”*
→ Supports Tough, High-Output Sessions* — Used before training to help support sustained effort and perceived intensity during demanding sets and intervals.*
→ Supports Work Capacity & Session Quality* — Aids your overall training workload when combined with a solid program, hydration, and nutrition plan.*
→ Between-Session Readiness Support* — Supports normal exercise metabolite handling as part of your recovery routine so you can return to training feeling prepared.*
→ 100% Single-Ingredient Formula* — Contains only Citrulline Malate 2:1, with no flavors, fillers, or proprietary blends.*

Who It’s For

→ Strength & Power Athletes: Looking to include citrulline malate in their pre-training routine alongside other performance supplements.*
→ Cross-Training & HIIT: Athletes who want a versatile, unflavored powder that fits demanding circuits and intervals.*
→ Bodybuilding & Physique: Lifters who value “pump”-focused training sessions and customizable pre-workout formulas.*
→ Endurance & Team Sports: Athletes who use citrulline malate as one component of their broader training and fueling strategy.*

How It Works (At a Glance)

Citrulline is converted to L-arginine in the body, which serves as a precursor in nitric oxide synthase pathways that are involved in normal NO production during exercise.* Malate (from malic acid) participates in the body’s citric acid (Krebs) cycle, an energy pathway that helps support repeated muscular efforts and overall training quality.* Together, citrulline and malate provide a stimulant-free option often used in sports nutrition to support training performance and session consistency.*

Ingredients & Amounts (Per Serving)

→ Citrulline Malate 2:1 — 5 g
• What it supports: → Provides L-citrulline, which is involved in arginine and nitric oxide pathways related to normal blood flow during exercise.*
• Training context: → Commonly used pre-workout to support demanding sets, intervals, and overall training volume.*
• Energy support: → Malate component is associated with the body’s natural energy-producing Krebs cycle for repeat-effort performance.*

Serving Size: 1 scoop (5 g)
Servings Per Container: 60
→ Label Transparency* — Single active ingredient; no proprietary blends or added stimulants.*

Potential Benefits of Citrulline Malate*

→ Pump & Circulation Support* — Helps support nitric oxide pathways and normal blood flow, which many athletes associate with training “pump.”*
→ Endurance & Intensity Support* — Used to help maintain challenging effort levels across sets and intervals as part of a complete program.*
→ Recovery & Readiness Support* — Supports the body’s normal response to exercise stress and metabolite buildup between sessions.*
→ Stim-Free Flexibility* — Stacks easily with creatine, electrolytes, non-stim pre-workouts, or your existing routine.*

How to Use

→ Mix 1 serving (5 g) with 8–12 oz of water or your pre-workout beverage 15–30 minutes before training.*
→ For extended or high-heat sessions, adjust fluids and electrolytes based on your sweat rate and individual needs.*
→ Use consistently alongside a structured training plan, adequate hydration, and a balanced diet for best support.*

Claims describe functional support for healthy, active adults when used as directed alongside a balanced diet, hydration, sleep, and training program. Individual responses vary; no specific outcomes are guaranteed.
